products.name: PE 505
products.shortDescription: PTFE compression packing for pumps and valves
products.description: PE 505 is a high-performance PTFE compression packing engineered for demanding industrial applications. Suitable for pumps, valves, and rotating equipment across diverse industries requiring reliable sealing solutions.

specifications.Velocity: 25 m/s at 100 bar, 10 m/s at 200-300 bar

technicalData.Material: Duplex braided packing from Expanded PTFE, Graphite, and MoS₂
technicalData.Construction: Molecular level bonding for superior integration
technicalData.Standard: Centrifugal pumps test procedure for seal packing

features: Crafted from a unique blend of expanded PTFE, graphite, and MoS₂ for superior performance
Exceptional resiliency combined with outstanding chemical resistance
Superior heat dissipation properties ensure extended service life
Anti-friction design protects shafts and sleeves from premature wear
Dimensionally stable construction requires minimal gland loading
Reliable performance at high speeds with minimal leakage
Smooth operation reduces equipment wear and maintenance costs
Compatible with a wide range of industrial media and applications
applications: Agitators and mixers in chemical plants
Process equipment excluding molten alkali metals

products.name: PE 504
products.description: PE 504 offers dependable PTFE sealing for general-purpose industrial applications. Features excellent chemical resistance and operates effectively across a wide temperature range, making it an ideal choice for standard pump and valve applications.

technicalData.Construction: PTFE filament yarn with lubricant impregnation

features: Universal chemical resistance across the full pH spectrum (0-14)
Low coefficient of friction extends packing and equipment service life
Self-lubricating design minimizes maintenance requirements
Cost-effective sealing solution for general industrial applications
Easy installation with minimal break-in period required

products.name: GM 360
products.shortDescription: Laminated graphite ring gasket for high-temperature applications
products.description: GM 360 is a premium laminated graphite ring gasket engineered for extreme temperature and pressure sealing applications. Features multiple layers of flexible graphite for superior conformability and sealing performance.

technicalData.Construction: Laminated flexible graphite layers

features: Exceptional temperature resistance for high-heat applications
Multi-layer construction provides superior sealing capability
Excellent conformability to flange surfaces
Broad chemical resistance across diverse media
Outstanding thermal stability in demanding conditions

products.name: INSULATION GASKET KIT 1800 FS
products.shortDescription: API 6FB fire safe isolation gasket kit
products.description: Complete flange isolation gasket kit certified to API 6FB fire-safe standards for cathodic protection and electrical isolation. Engineered to provide reliable electrical isolation while maintaining sealing integrity in fire conditions.

technicalData.Construction: Complete kit with gasket, sleeves, washers
technicalData.Certification: API 6FB Fire Safe, ASTM B117 salt spray

features: API 6FB fire-safe certified design for critical safety compliance
Complete cathodic protection isolation for corrosion prevention
ASTM B117 salt spray corrosion resistant construction
Methane and helium-nitrogen leak tested for integrity verification
Extended service life in harsh environmental conditions

products.name: 750SS WELDING BLANKET
products.description: 750SS provides reliable thermal protection for welding, grinding, and high-temperature insulation applications. Features heavy-duty construction with specially formulated treatments for exceptional thermal resistance.

technicalData.Material: Heavy duty fabric woven by high SiO2 content yarn with acid treatment

features: Heavy-duty insulation fabric with specially formulated acid treatment
Vermiculite coating enhances thermal protection properties
Continuous use rating at 2000°F (1100°C), short-term up to 2550°F (1400°C)
Electrically and thermally insulating, ideal for welding booth construction and heat protection
Qualified to UL-94 Class V0 flammability standard
Enhanced abrasion resistance and tensile strength
No flashing and no after-glow during fire testing
applications: Welding spark and cutting spatter protection
Thermal protection for different technique branches
Filtration of high temperature liquid metal
Manufacturing of filters for corrosive medium cleaning

products.name: Laminar Gasket
products.description: High-performance metallic gasket engineered for extreme temperature and pressure applications with multi-layer construction. Provides exceptional resilience and sealing reliability in thermal cycling conditions.

technicalData.Construction: Multi-layer laminated metal with soft core

features: Multi-layer construction delivers superior sealing performance
Extreme temperature and pressure handling capability
Excellent resilience and recovery properties
Available in various metallurgies for diverse applications
Suitable for thermal cycling applications
High cycle life with leak-tight performance

products.name: Kammprofile Gasket
products.shortDescription: Serrated metal core gaskets with flexible facing
products.description: High-performance serrated metal gasket combining the resilience of soft materials with the mechanical strength of metal for demanding applications. Ideal for heat exchangers and high-stress sealing requirements.

specifications.Material Options: SS304, SS316, Graphite facing, PTFE facing

technicalData.Construction: Serrated metal core with soft facing layers

features: Serrated core provides excellent sealing capability
Low bolt load requirements reduce flange stress
Excellent performance in heat exchanger applications
High blowout resistance for safety and reliability
Reusable metal core reduces maintenance costs
Ideal for high-stress sealing applications

products.name: Shim Joint
products.shortDescription: Precision metal shim gaskets for tight tolerances
products.description: Ultra-thin precision metal gaskets designed for applications requiring tight sealing with minimal compression. Provides precise thickness control and excellent dimensional stability.

technicalData.Construction: Single or multi-layer precision shim

features: Precise thickness control for critical applications
Low compression set maintains sealing integrity
Excellent sealing performance on machined surfaces
Cost-effective gasket solution
Available in multiple materials and custom sizes

products.name: Double Jacketed Gasket
products.shortDescription: Metal jacketed gaskets with soft filler core
products.description: Robust double-jacketed metal gaskets combining the chemical resistance of metal with the conformability of soft filler material. Protects filler from chemical attack while providing excellent sealing.

specifications.Material Options: SS304, SS316, Inconel jacket with ceramic/graphite filler

technicalData.Construction: Metal jacket with compressed filler material

features: Superior chemical resistance from metal jacketing
High-temperature handling capability
Excellent conformability to flange surfaces
Protects filler material from chemical attack
Suitable for damaged or irregular flanges

products.name: Ring Type Joint Gasket
products.shortDescription: RTJ ring gaskets for high-pressure applications
products.description: Solid metal ring gaskets engineered for extreme pressure applications in oil and gas industries. Features self-energizing design for reliable metal-to-metal sealing in critical wellhead applications.

technicalData.Construction: Solid metal ring with octagonal or oval cross-section

features: Extreme pressure capability for demanding services
Metal-to-metal sealing for reliable performance
Self-energizing design enhances sealing under pressure
Specifically suitable for wellhead applications

products.name: Corrugated Gasket
products.shortDescription: Corrugated metal gaskets for flexible sealing
products.description: Flexible corrugated metal gaskets providing excellent resilience and adaptability to flange irregularities. Engineered to accommodate flange movement and thermal cycling while maintaining sealing integrity.

technicalData.Construction: Corrugated metal core with soft filler

features: High flexibility and resilience accommodate flange movement
Accommodates thermal expansion and flange misalignment
Low bolt load requirements reduce installation stress
Excellent recovery properties maintain sealing
Suitable for thermal cycling applications

products.name: Soft Iron Ring
products.shortDescription: Soft iron ring gaskets for extreme pressure

products.name: NA 432
products.description: NA 432 is a premium compressed non-asbestos fiber (CNAF) gasket sheet designed for general industrial applications with excellent sealing properties. Features organic fiber construction bound with nitrile rubber for reliable performance.

technicalData.Standard: ASTM F 152, ASTM F 36 J, DIN 52913

features: Suitable for general-purpose industrial applications with organic fibers
Bound with NBR (Nitrile Butadiene Rubber) for flexibility
Excellent resistance to oils, fuels, and water
Cost-effective sealing solution for medium service conditions
Good compressibility and recovery properties
applications: Medium like oil, steam, fuel, water applications

products.name: NA 420
products.description: NA 420 is a high-quality compressed non-asbestos fiber gasket sheet for moderate temperature and pressure applications. Features mineral and aramid fiber construction for enhanced performance.

technicalData.Standard: ASTM F 152, ASTM F 36 J, DIN 52913

Suitable for oils, fuels, lubricants, alcohols, and gases
Good chemical resistance across various industrial media
Enhanced temperature performance up to 220°C
Suitable for medium-stress sealing conditions
applications: Most diluted acids and alkalies for medium stress conditions

Enhanced temperature capability up to 250°C
Superior tensile strength and recovery properties
Suitable for medium-stress industrial applications
Good performance with oils, fuels, and lubricants

products.shortDescription: General equipment compressed non-asbestos fiber gasket

products.name: FG 320
products.material: INGRAF Plain Sheet - Pure Flexible Graphite
products.shortDescription: High-purity flexible graphite sheet with 99% to 99.9% carbon content for extreme temperature and pressure applications
products.description: FG 320 is manufactured from exfoliated graphite through acid treatment with 100% acids washed out by DM water. The manufacturing process is mechanical without incorporation of any additives or bonding material, resulting in flexible pure graphite sheet with carbon content 99% to 99.9%. Highly resilient and easily adapts to irregularities of flange or surface to make perfect seal. Suitable for metallic, glass, and enamel flanges, designed for trouble-free change over which ultimately reduces maintenance cost. Dimensionally stable under extreme pressure surge and suitable for cryogenic services.

technicalData.Manufacturing Process: Mechanical exfoliation with acid treatment, 100% DM water washed

features: Ultra-high purity with 99% to 99.9% carbon content
Extreme temperature capability from -200°C to 550°C
Highly resilient and adapts easily to surface irregularities
Dimensionally stable under extreme pressure surge
Suitable for cryogenic services
No additives or bonding materials - pure graphite
Trouble-free installation reduces maintenance costs
Excellent compressibility (35-40%) and recovery (15-18%)
Superior sealability for fuel and nitrogen applications
Low permeability (0.40 nitrogen cc/min)
applications: Super heated and saturated steam applications
Lube oil and general industrial sealing

products.name: SSF 321
products.material: INGRAF Plain with SS Foil Insert - Graphite with Stainless Steel Reinforcement
products.shortDescription: Flexible pure graphite sheet with plain stainless steel foil insert for enhanced mechanical strength in high-pressure applications
products.description: SSF 321 sheet is manufactured from plain SS sheet sandwich between two layers of flexible pure graphite sheet. The manufacturing process is mechanical without incorporation of any additives on bonding materials. SS sheet insert graphite gaskets are suitable for metallic, glass, enamel flanges and are designed for trouble-free change over which ultimately reduces maintenance cost. Dimensionally stable under extreme pressure surge and suitable for cryogenic services.

technicalData.Material: Plain SS foil sandwiched between flexible pure graphite sheets
technicalData.Manufacturing Process: Mechanical process without additives or bonding materials

features: SS foil reinforcement increases mechanical strength
Chemical properties of flexible pure graphite remain intact
Resistant to almost all non-chemicals
Good compressibility (35-40%) and recovery (15-18%)
Seals perfectly with enhanced pressure capability
Does not age or creep under hot or cold working conditions
Dimensionally stable under extreme pressure
Enhanced temperature range up to +650°C in steam
Low permeability (0.40 nitrogen cc/min)
Superior m-factor (2.8) and y-factor (4700 psi)
applications: Pipe flanges in extreme pressure applications
Super heated and saturated steam services
